mapper.select: select cp.id as cp_id, #{contractId} as contract_id, c.id as category_id, cp.price as price, c.name as category_name, c.level as category_level, c.parent_id as parent_id, pc.name as parent_name, c.internal_price as dict_internal_price, c.external_price as dict_external_price from proj_category c left join proj_category pc on pc.id = c.parent_id and pc.del_flag = '0' left join proj_contract_price cp on cp.category_id = c.id and cp.contract_id = #{contractId} and cp.del_flag = '0' where c.del_flag = '0' and c.status = '0' order by c.parent_id nulls first, c.sort_order, c.id

select cp.id as cp_id, cp.contract_id, cp.category_id, cp.price, c.name as category_name, c.level as category_level, c.parent_id, cp.create_by, cp.create_time, cp.update_by, cp.update_time from proj_contract_price cp inner join proj_category c on c.id = cp.category_id and c.del_flag = '0' where cp.contract_id = #{contractId} and cp.del_flag = '0' order by c.parent_id, c.sort_order
mapper.insert: insert into proj_contract_price( contract_id, category_id, price, create_by, create_time )values( #{contractId}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{createBy}, now() )
